race.comment: Time for the cup now and ROYAL TORONADO (8) looks the one to beat after scoring narrowly as favourite at Ascot last time out. The rise in trip is ideal for him now and Pike remaining in the saddle is a big push for his chances. Can lob into a midfield position and storm over the top with further improvement up his sleeve. ARCADIA PARK (2) stuck on strongly to win the Bunbury Cup by 0.2L a fortnight ago. He did so from a wide barrier and CJP will have to replicate that ride today. He looks to be hitting his straps now and there's no reason why he can't repeat the dose. SILVER EYE (1) does meet ARCADIA PARK better at the weights for a narrow margin last time out and draws better this time as well. O'Donnell knows him well and things are expected to pan out a bit better for him this time. Big chance to turn the tables. SOLDANELLE (12) is racing well and can't be discounted out to this trip for the first time. FLY WITH CAUTION (5) stuck on well at Bunbury and should get all the favours.
